---
title: "p8106_hw3_sc5826"
author: "Shivalika Chavan"
date: "2026-03-28"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(car)
library(corrplot)
library(earth)
library(vip)
library(MASS)
library(pROC)
library(purrr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```
